entries.content: `docs/specs/advance-workflow.md` can lag `.adv/specs/advance-workflow/spec.json`; when adding spec-law scenarios, mirror the relevant section manually and update the doc header version/date if the mirror is stale.

Advance's repo-local `bin/oc-test` wrapper is at the repository root; running `bin/oc-test ...` from `plugin/` fails with exit 127. Use repo root as workdir for wrapper-based tests, even when test paths are under `plugin/src`.

`adv_change_create target_path` source-link write is already ordered after `targetStore.changes.create`; tests can prove no-partial-link behavior by making target create throw and asserting `sourceStore.changes.save` is not called.

Acceptance coverage for target mutation readiness should exercise stale, absent, and unavailable server poller statuses at the target-store boundary, not only in lower-level queue serviceability helpers.
